registryPurpose: Track local diagnostic manual availability, review state, imported coverage, and future Telegram manual-library eligibility without loading manuals into runtime diagnostic knowledge.
manualBoundImportRule: One manual = one source. Do not use internet sources, model memory, mixed manuals, or cross-series generalization.

futureTelegramManualLibraryPolicy.rule: Consumers must not receive manuals. Eligible authenticated technical roles may request reviewed manuals through Telegram file_id bindings when server-local bindings exist.

manuals.modelScope: Broad GMV indoor-unit manual covering floor-standing, duct, cassette, floor-ceiling, fresh-air, air-handler, console, wall-mounted, AHU-KIT, and concealed indoor-unit types; model tables use GMV-ND and related indoor-unit model families.
manuals.documentTitle: Service Manual - Multi Variable Air Conditioners Indoor Units
manuals.notes: ED-24F.1b merged GC202004-X as additional sourceReferences on 38 existing GMV6 indoor entries. No duplicate diagnostic entries were created. The 19 detailed troubleshooting codes were reviewed; no Installer/Engineer prose was changed because existing qualified-service text already keeps procedure execution bounded by the manual and several procedures include component replacement or electrical service actions.

analysis.versionOrDateNote: No explicit manual version or publication date was found on the cover or reviewed identity pages; PDF metadata is not treated as document version evidence.
analysis.diagnosticTable: Maintenance / 1 Troubleshooting / 1.1 Malfunction List for the Wired Controller, manual page 173, PDF page 178
analysis.troubleshootingRange: Maintenance / 1.2 Exception Analyzing and Troubleshooting, manual pages 173-185, PDF pages 178-190
skippedScopes: Control parameter/query codes such as C00/P00 interfaces
analysis.mergeNotes: Same code + same equipment type + same meaning remains one diagnostic answer with multiple sourceReferences. Procedures were reviewed but not copied into localized text in this stage.

futureTelegramManualLibrary.reason: Manual identity is verified and sourceReferences now connect reviewed diagnostic entries to this manual. Runtime file delivery uses server-local Telegram file bindings when configured.
